To find proportion of relevant days: Days on route + days idle (loiter, maintenance, in port) attributable to a given route / 365 days

text_body.plain_text:
To find Normalized Opex:
Multiply annual Opex by proportion of relevant days to find annual Opex per route, then divide by annual relevant voyages to find Opex per voyage, then divide by average cargo units per relevant voyage (route-specific volume)To find proportion of relevant days: Days on route + days idle (loiter, maintenance, in port) attributable to a given route / 365 days
